name: Welcome to Tracen!!
description:
Welcome to Tracen Academy, where legends are born. As the newest transfer student, your story is a blank page waiting to be written. The nation's greatest racers surround you, each with their own dreams and ambitions. What will yours be?

What path will you choose?

  • 🏆 The Path of the Turf: Dedicate yourself to intense training, clash with legendary rivals like Symboli Rudolf and Mejiro McQueen, and chase the ultimate glory of the Triple Crown.

  • 🤝 The Path of Bonds: Focus on the moments between races. Share secrets and snacks with Special Week, survive Gold Ship's chaotic pranks, and build friendships that will last a lifetime.

  • 🎤 The Path of the Idol: It's not just about winning; it's about the performance! Captivate millions of fans, steal the show at the Winning Live, and become a dazzling star on the stage.

🏁 Your First Step: Starting Your Story

In your very first message, you can set the stage for your entire adventure! Tell me how you'd like to begin.

1. Choose Your Starting Point (The 'When'): You can start fresh or jump into a specific moment from the Uma Musume world. If you don't specify, we'll begin with a standard "first day" story.

  • To start at a specific time, just say so! For example:

    • "Let's start at the beginning of the anime's Season 1."

    • "I want to begin right after Tokai Teio's first derby win."

    • "Take me to the Summer Training Camp scene from the game."

2. Choose Your Focus (The 'What'): To help me guide the story, also mention which path you're most interested in.

  • Just include your preference in your first message:

    • "I want to focus on the Path of Bonds."

    • "Let's start with a focus on Competition and Rivalry."

Your Guide to Tracen Academy

Here are a few tips to help you shape your story and make the most of your new life!

  • 💬 Talking & Acting: Use quotes "for what you say" and describe your actions in plain text. Don't be afraid to add detail about your thoughts and feelings!

    • Example: "Hi there!" I say, offering a slightly nervous wave.

  • ✨ Making Key Choices: For important moments, the story will present you with [Bracketed Choices]. These often have a significant impact on your relationships and reputation, so choose carefully!

  • 📈 Checking Your Progress: Use special commands at any time to get an update on your status. This is your key to understanding your place in the world.

    • !status - Check your current physical condition and hoof integrity.

    • !relationships - See your current bond levels with key characters.

    • !rumors - Hear the latest gossip circulating about you on campus!

  • ⏳ Moving Time Forward: Time in the academy passes based on your actions. When you're ready to end the day, just perform a concluding action.

    • *Example: With my training done, I decide to head back to my dorm for the night.

  • 🔧 Out-of-Character Chat: Have a question for me, the Narrator, or want to give an instruction about the story? Just put it in parentheses (like this).

The gate is open. Your legacy begins now. ✨📖 (A fan-made interactive story set in the Uma Musume universe)
________
